overview: Tactics RPG with turn-based combat, summons, spells, and challenges, receiving a batch of gameplay fixes.
features: Three-way turn router for player, summon, and enemy turns
Summon spells that cost AP and act via AI profiles
Direct Hit challenge replacing the old physical-only challenge
Barrier spell that appears, blocks movement and sight, and expires
Line of sight for all spells with void exemption
Doka spawns that avoid void and wall tiles
Single-tile occupancy enforcement across all movement
